stem: Under the Financial Advisers Act, who holds the financial adviser licence?

options.B: The financial advisory firm/entity, while individuals act as registered representatives

explanation: 牌照发给实体;个人以委任代表身份经 RNF 登记。
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR)

stem: Before an individual may begin providing financial advisory services as a representative, they must:

options.A: Pass any one exam and start immediately
options.B: Be fit and proper and be registered with MAS (RNF) under a licensed/exempt FA

explanation: 代表须 fit & proper 并经 RNF 登记后方可展业。
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR)
